node.text: Caroline painted a piece inspired by a visit to an LGBTQ center, aiming to capture unity and strength.

node.text: Caroline is planning an LGBTQ art show with her paintings for next month.

node.text: Caroline treasures a hand-painted bowl made by a friend for her 18th birthday, which reminds her of art and self-expression.
Caroline made a painting representing her journey as a trans woman.
Caroline has been creating art since the age of 17.
Caroline uses art to express her feelings and explore her gender identity.
